name: clanker-captcha
description: An experimental CAPTCHA widget designed for pixel-reading agents rather than humans.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check src/clanker-captcha.js && node --check src/challenge-api.js && node --check src/worker.js
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/src && cp index.html dist/index.html && cp src/clanker-captcha.js dist/src/clanker-captcha.js && cp favicon.svg favicon.ico favicon-180.png dist/
